title: IDF launches first strikes since ceasefire extended — 9 villages evacuated, wave of airstrikes on Hezbollah infrastructure in south Lebanon
snippet: IDF launched wave of airstrikes on Hezbollah infrastructure in southern Lebanon, first since 45-day ceasefire extension announced a day earlier. Evacuation warnings issued for 9 villages (Qaaqaaiyet al-Snoubar, Kaouthariyet El Saiyad, Merouaniyeh, Ghassaniyeh, Tefahta, Irzay, Babliyeh, Insar, al-Baisariyah). IDF stated: 'In light of Hezbollah terror organization's violations of ceasefire agreement, IDF is forced to act against it with force.' Residents fled toward Sidon and Beirut.
tag_reason: 45일 휴전 연장 후 첫 대규모 공습. 이전 보도와 시간적/내용적 구분이 명확한 신규 사건.
